Mullen TreeFlux Analysis

JM

2026-06-29

Welcome to the TEMPEST Flood Tree Greenhouse Gas Flux dataset analysis!

TEMPEST flood dates

flood_date <- tribble(~Event, ~Start, ~End,
                      "T1", "2022-06-22", "2022-06-22",
                      "T2", "2023-06-06", "2023-06-07",
                      "T3", "2024-06-11", "2024-06-13")
flood_date$Start <- ymd(flood_date$Start)
flood_date$End <- ymd(flood_date$End)

knitr::kable(flood_date)
Event Start End
T1 2022-06-22 2022-06-22
T2 2023-06-06 2023-06-07
T3 2024-06-11 2024-06-13

Read data

# Read in data from Apache Parquet file -----
FLUX_DATA_FILE <- "tempest_tree_ghg_fluxes.parquet"
message("Reading ", FLUX_DATA_FILE)
## Reading tempest_tree_ghg_fluxes.parquet
my_data <- read_parquet(FLUX_DATA_FILE)

code_to_name <- c(ACRU = "Red Maple", FAGR = "Beech", LITU = "Tulip Poplar")

TREE_MAPPING_FILE <- "ancillary_data/sapflow_tree_mapping.csv"
message("Reading ", TREE_MAPPING_FILE)
## Reading ancillary_data/sapflow_tree_mapping.csv
tree_map <- read.csv(TREE_MAPPING_FILE,
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), trimws)) %>%
  transmute(ID = Sapflux_ID,
            Species_from_map = unname(code_to_name[Species_Code])) %>%
  distinct(ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

my_data <- my_data %>%
  left_join(tree_map, by = "ID") %>%
  mutate(Species = coalesce(Species, Species_from_map)) %>%
  select(-Species_from_map)

message("Trees with NA species: ", sum(is.na(my_data$Species)))
## Trees with NA species: 0

Prep Soil Temp Data

read_L2_variable(variable = "soil-temp-5cm", path = "Sensor_Data/", quiet=TRUE)
## # A tibble: 3,156,480 × 12
##    Site  Plot  TIMESTAMP           Instrument Instrument_ID Sensor_ID Location
##    <chr> <chr> <dttm>              <chr>      <chr>         <chr>     <chr>   
##  1 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:00:00 TEROS12    12            T108      C6      
##  2 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:00:00 TEROS12    12            T131      H6      
##  3 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:00:00 TEROS12    11            T138      C3      
##  4 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:00:00 TEROS12    13            T174      H3      
##  5 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:00:00 TEROS12    13            T177      F4      
##  6 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:15:00 TEROS12    12            T108      C6      
##  7 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:15:00 TEROS12    12            T131      H6      
##  8 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:15:00 TEROS12    11            T138      C3      
##  9 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:15:00 TEROS12    13            T174      H3      
## 10 TMP   C     2020-01-01 00:15:00 TEROS12    13            T177      F4      
## # ℹ 3,156,470 more rows
## # ℹ 5 more variables: research_name <chr>, Value <dbl>, N_avg <int>,
## #   N_drop <int>, Value_MAC <dbl>

Take daily avg

soil_temp_data <- read_L2_variable(variable = "soil-temp-5cm",
                                   path = "Sensor_Data/", quiet = TRUE)
soil_temp_daily <- soil_temp_data %>%
  mutate(
    TIMESTAMP = as.POSIXct(TIMESTAMP),
    Date = as.Date(TIMESTAMP),
    Value = as.numeric(Value) ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Value)) %>%  
  group_by(Site, Plot, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    soil_temp_daily_mean = mean(Value),
    n = n(),
    coverage = n / 480,      
    .groups = "drop"  )
print(soil_temp_daily)
## # A tibble: 6,020 × 6
##    Site  Plot  Date       soil_temp_daily_mean     n coverage
##    <chr> <chr> <date>                    <dbl> <int>    <dbl>
##  1 TMP   C     2020-05-05                12.7     37   0.0771
##  2 TMP   C     2020-05-06                11.9     96   0.2   
##  3 TMP   C     2020-05-07                11.4     96   0.2   
##  4 TMP   C     2020-05-08                11.9     96   0.2   
##  5 TMP   C     2020-05-09                 9.68    96   0.2   
##  6 TMP   C     2020-05-10                 9.76    96   0.2   
##  7 TMP   C     2020-05-11                11.1     96   0.2   
##  8 TMP   C     2020-05-12                10.6     96   0.2   
##  9 TMP   C     2020-05-13                11.3     96   0.2   
## 10 TMP   C     2020-05-14                12.2     96   0.2   
## # ℹ 6,010 more rows

Graphs of Soil Temp Data (Daily averages over time)

ggplot(soil_temp_daily,aes(x = Date, y = soil_temp_daily_mean,
color = Plot, group = Plot)) + geom_line(alpha = 0.7) + facet_wrap(~ Site) +
labs( title = "Daily Mean Soil Temperature by Plot",
   x = "Date",
   y = "Soil Temperature (°C)" ) 

ggplot(soil_temp_daily, aes(x = Date, y = soil_temp_daily_mean,color = Plot)) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE, method = "loess") +
  facet_wrap(~ Site) +
  labs( title = "Smoothed Daily Soil Temperature Trends by Plot",
      x = "Date",
      y = "Soil Temperature (°C)"  ) 
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Numerical summaries —–

print(my_data) # BBL: print summary of fluxes? A table with mean, min, max and date ranges

my_data %>% ggplot(aes( x = Year, y = CH4_lin_flux.estimate, color = Plot )) + geom_point(alpha = 0.6) + facet_wrap(~ Species) + labs( title = “CH4 Flux by Species (2021–2025)” )

my_data %>% ggplot(aes( x = Year, y = CO2_lin_flux.estimate, color = Plot )) + geom_point(alpha = 0.6) + facet_wrap(~ Species) + labs( title = “CO2 Flux by Species (2021–2025)”, y = “CO2 Flux” )

Numerical summaries

print(my_data)

## # ℹ 3,351 more rows

## #   CH4_rob_flux.estimate <dbl>
# BBL: print summary of fluxes? A table with mean, min, max and date ranges

Plots

Overall data, by species

my_data %>%
  ggplot(aes( x = Year, y = CH4_lin_flux.estimate, color = Plot )) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ Species) +
  labs( title = "CH4 Flux by Species (2021–2025)" )

my_data %>%
  ggplot(aes( x = Year, y = CO2_lin_flux.estimate, color = Plot )) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ Species) +
  labs( title = "CO2 Flux by Species (2021–2025)", y = "CO2 Flux" )

Flux ranges by species

# Overall flux range (using boxplot) for each gas, by tree species
ggplot(my_data,aes(x = Species, y = CH4_lin_flux.estimate, fill = Plot)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(my_data, aes(x = Species,  y = CO2_lin_flux.estimate, fill = Plot)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
